quotes.quote: I am no bird; and no net ensnares me: I am a free human being with an independent will.
quotes.author: Charlotte Brontë

quotes.quote: It is nothing to die; it is dreadful not to live.
quotes.author: Victor Hugo

quotes.quote: The only way out of the labyrinth of suffering is to forgive.
quotes.author: John Green

quotes.quote: So we beat on, boats against the current, borne back ceaselessly into the past.
quotes.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

quotes.quote: I would always rather be happy than dignified.
quotes.author: Charlotte Brontë

quotes.quote: The only thing worse than being in an awkward situation is having to witness it.
quotes.author: Kurt Vonnegut

quotes.quote: I am not afraid of storms, for I am learning how to sail my ship.
quotes.author: Louisa May Alcott

quotes.quote: There is some good in this world, and it's worth fighting for.
quotes.author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quotes.quote: I take my sanity very seriously, but I also know that it fluctuates.
quotes.author: David Sedaris

quotes.quote: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.quote: My brain has too many tabs open and they're all playing music.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.quote: I'm not lazy, I'm just on energy-saving mode.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.quote: I don't need anger management. I need people who don't annoy me.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.quote: Adulting is like folding a fitted sheet. No one really knows how.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.quote: My bed is a magical place where I suddenly remember everything I forgot.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.quote: I'm not arguing, I'm just explaining why I'm right.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.quote: Sarcasm: the ability to insult idiots without them noticing.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.quote: I love deadlines. I especially love the whooshing sound they make as they fly by.
quotes.author: Douglas Adams

quotes.quote: The two most common elements in the universe are hydrogen and stupidity.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.quote: I'm not superstitious, but I am a little stitious.
quotes.author: Michael Scott

quotes.quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
quotes.author: George Adel

quotes.quote: The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little extra.
quotes.author: Jimmy Johnson

quotes.quote: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
quotes.author: Wayne Gretzky

quotes.quote: Dream big and dare to fail.
quotes.author: Norman Vaughan

quotes.quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.quote: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
quotes.author: Tim Notke

quotes.quote: The best revenge is massive success.
quotes.author: Frank Sinatra

quotes.quote: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.quote: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: Don't count the days, make the days count.
quotes.author: Muhammad Ali

quotes.quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
quotes.author: John Lennon

quotes.quote: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.quote: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
quotes.author: Tony Robbins

quotes.quote: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: I have not failed. I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.quote: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.quote: If you look at what you have in life, you'll always have more.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.quote: Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: In the depth of winter, I finally learned that within me there lay an invincible summer.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: The unexamined life is not worth living.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.quote: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: First they ignore you, then they laugh at you, then they fight you, then you win.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Darkness cannot drive out darkness: only light can do that.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: The mind is not a vessel to be filled but a fire to be kindled.
quotes.author: Plutarch

quotes.quote: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: The two most important days in your life are the day you are born and the day you find out why.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: Your time is limited, don't waste it living someone else's life.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Not all those who wander are lost.
quotes.author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quotes.quote: Be the change you wish to see in the world.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: The greatest wealth is health.
quotes.author: Virgil

quotes.quote: An unexamined life is not worth living.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.quote: Knowledge is power.
quotes.author: Francis Bacon

quotes.quote: Courage is not the absence of fear, but rather the judgement that something else is more important than fear.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Life shrinks or expands in proportion to one's courage.
quotes.author: Anais Nin

quotes.quote: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
quotes.author: John D. Rockefeller
